text:
The web search returned no results for the exact paper title "Generative ai for de novo drug design: recent advances, challenges, and future directions" by Xuegong Liu, Qing Song, Yu Wei, and Yun Xu in *Drug Discovery Today* (2023). Instead, a similar but distinctly different paper was found — "A Survey of Generative AI for de novo Drug Design: New Frontiers in Molecule and Protein Generation" by Xiangru Tang et al., published in *Briefings in Bioinformatics* (2024) — with completely different authors and venue.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: No paper matching the exact title and listed authors was found in any academic database or via web search. The closest real paper found has a different title, completely different authors (Xiangru Tang et al.), and a different venue, strongly suggesting the cited reference is fabricated.
LINK: NONE
